Bash(SRK='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFhdHZja2FsbnZvamx5a2Znbm16Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDI4MzczOSwiZXhwIjoyMDc5ODU5NzM5fQ.RvL9s8UpoKIof6D8AA2e81QL7ENVQi6LELhDj3n1Ryw' && BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1"

echo "=== Reports for 2014-01-20 ==="
curl -s "${BASE}/daily_reports?date=eq.2014-01-20&select=id,date,inspector_name,contractor,foreman,spread,activities,activity_blocks&order=id" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Found {len\(data\)} reports\\n'\)
for r in data:
    blocks = r.get\('activity_blocks'\) or []
    print\(f'Report {r[\\"id\\"][:8]}...'\)
    print\(f'  Inspector: {r.get\(\\"inspector_name\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Contractor: {r.get\(\\"contractor\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Foreman: {r.get\(\\"foreman\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Activities: {r.get\(\\"activities\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Blocks: {len\(blocks\)}'\)
    for i, b in enumerate\(blocks\):
        crew = b.get\('contractor','?'\)
        ticket = b.get\('ticketNumber','?'\)
        foreman = b.get\('foreman','?'\)
        activity = b.get\('activityType','?'\)
        photos = b.get\('ticketPhotos'\) or \(\([b['ticketPhoto']] if b.get\('ticketPhoto'\) else []\)\)
        labour = len\(b.get\('labourEntries'\) or []\)
        equip = len\(b.get\('equipmentEntries'\) or []\)
        print\(f'    Block {i}: crew=\\"{crew}\\" ticket=\\"{ticket}\\" foreman=\\"{foreman}\\" activity=\\"{activity}\\" photos={len\(photos\)} labour={labour} equip={equip}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(SRK='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFhdHZja2FsbnZvamx5a2Znbm16Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDI4MzczOSwiZXhwIjoyMDc5ODU5NzM5fQ.RvL9s8UpoKIof6D8AA2e81QL7ENVQi6LELhDj3n1Ryw' && BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1"

curl -s "${BASE}/daily_reports?date=eq.2014-01-20&select=id,date,inspector_name,contractor,foreman,spread,activity_blocks&order=id" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Found {len\(data\)} reports\\n'\)
for r in data:
    blocks = r.get\('activity_blocks'\) or []
    rid = str\(r['id']\)
    print\(f'Report {rid[:12]}'\)
    print\(f'  Inspector: {r.get\(\\"inspector_name\\"\)}  Contractor: {r.get\(\\"contractor\\"\)}  Foreman: {r.get\(\\"foreman\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  Blocks: {len\(blocks\)}'\)
    for i, b in enumerate\(blocks\):
        crew = b.get\('contractor','?'\)
        ticket = b.get\('ticketNumber','?'\)
        foreman = b.get\('foreman','?'\)
        activity = b.get\('activityType','?'\)
        tp = b.get\('ticketPhotos'\) or []
        if not tp and b.get\('ticketPhoto'\):
            tp = [b['ticketPhoto']]
        print\(f'    [{i}] ticket={ticket}  crew={crew}  foreman={foreman}  activity={activity}  photos={len\(tp\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -120)

Bash(SRK='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFhdHZja2FsbnZvamx5a2Znbm16Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDI4MzczOSwiZXhwIjoyMDc5ODU5NzM5fQ.RvL9s8UpoKIof6D8AA2e81QL7ENVQi6LELhDj3n1Ryw' && BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1"

curl -s "${BASE}/daily_reports?date=eq.2014-01-20&select=id,date,inspector_name,contractor,foreman,spread,activity_blocks&order=id" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Count all blocks and unique foremen
all_blocks = []
for r in data:
    for i, b in enumerate\(r.get\('activity_blocks'\) or []\):
        tp = b.get\('ticketPhotos'\) or []
        if not tp and b.get\('ticketPhoto'\):
            tp = [b['ticketPhoto']]
        all_blocks.append\({
            'report_id': r['id'],
            'block_idx': i,
            'crew': b.get\('contractor',''\),
            'foreman': b.get\('foreman',''\),
            'ticket': b.get\('ticketNumber',''\),
            'activity': b.get\('activityType',''\),
            'photos': len\(tp\),
            'photo_paths': tp[:1]  # first photo path
        }\)

print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)} reports, {len\(all_blocks\)} activity blocks'\)
print\(f'Blocks with photos: {sum\(1 for b in all_blocks if b[\\"photos\\"] > 0\)}'\)
print\(f'Blocks with ticket #: {sum\(1 for b in all_blocks if b[\\"ticket\\"]\)}'\)
print\(\)

# Unique foremen
foremen = sorted\(set\(b['foreman'] for b in all_blocks if b['foreman']\)\)
print\(f'Unique foremen \({len\(foremen\)}\):'\)
for f in foremen:
    matching = [b for b in all_blocks if b['foreman'] == f]
    print\(f'  {f} — ticket={matching[0][\\"ticket\\"]} crew={matching[0][\\"crew\\"]} activity={matching[0][\\"activity\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(SRK='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFhdHZja2FsbnZvamx5a2Znbm16Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDI4MzczOSwiZXhwIjoyMDc5ODU5NzM5fQ.RvL9s8UpoKIof6D8AA2e81QL7ENVQi6LELhDj3n1Ryw' && BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1"

echo "Deleting TEST_DELETE_ME reports..."
curl -s -X DELETE "${BASE}/daily_reports?inspector_name=eq.TEST_DELETE_ME" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}"

echo "Deleting old Test Inspector reports..."
curl -s -X DELETE "${BASE}/daily_reports?inspector_name=eq.Test%20Inspector" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}"

echo "Deleting Test Inspector \(Recon\) reports..."
curl -s -X DELETE "${BASE}/daily_reports?inspector_name=eq.Test%20Inspector%20\(Recon\)" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}"

echo "Checking what remains..."
curl -s "${BASE}/daily_reports?date=eq.2014-01-20&select=id,inspector_name&order=id" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'{len\(d\)} reports remain for 2014-01-20'\)
inspectors = set\(r['inspector_name'] for r in d\)
print\(f'Inspectors: {inspectors}'\)
")

Bash(SRK='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImFhdHZja2FsbnZvamx5a2Znbm16Iiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDI4MzczOSwiZXhwIjoyMDc5ODU5NzM5fQ.RvL9s8UpoKIof6D8AA2e81QL7ENVQi6LELhDj3n1Ryw' && BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1"

curl -s "${BASE}/lem_reconciliation_pairs?select=pair_index,work_date,crew_name,status,match_method,lem_page_urls,contractor_ticket_urls&order=pair_index&limit=73" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SRK}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SRK}" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'{len\(data\)} pairs\\n'\)

# Summarize crew names
crews = {}
for p in data:
    cn = p.get\('crew_name'\) or '\(null\)'
    crews[cn] = crews.get\(cn, 0\) + 1

print\('Crew names on pairs:'\)
for cn, count in sorted\(crews.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]\):
    print\(f'  {count:3d}x  {cn}'\)

print\(\)
dates = set\(p.get\('work_date'\) for p in data\)
print\(f'Dates: {dates}'\)

lem_urls = sum\(1 for p in data if p.get\('lem_page_urls'\) and len\(p['lem_page_urls']\) > 0\)
ticket_urls = sum\(1 for p in data if p.get\('contractor_ticket_urls'\) and len\(p['contractor_ticket_urls']\) > 0\)
print\(f'Pairs with LEM images: {lem_urls}'\)
print\(f'Pairs with ticket images: {ticket_urls}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1" __NEW_LINE_6c86ad284186723f__ echo "=== Rate cards matching skew/shew/operator ===" curl -s "$BASE/labour_rates?select=classification,rate_st,rate_ot&organization_id=eq.00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001" -H "apikey: $SRK" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SRK")

Bash(BASE="https://aatvckalnvojlykfgnmz.supabase.co/rest/v1" __NEW_LINE_4242ca987c9bb95b__ echo "=== Ticket 18199 inspector equipment entries ===" curl -s "$BASE/daily_reports?select=activity_blocks&date=eq.2014-01-20" -H "apikey: $SRK" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SRK")
